feedback.text: No user should be subject to restrictions over any application they are allowed to install or be restricted to not have the freedom to do what they want on their own personal device. Restricting side loading apps from a company like Google or any company is an unfair practice because as I said it is subjecting users to the indirect control of the number and type of applications installed on their phone which is unjustifiable. A user should be able to do most things on the device that they buy with their money, and putting unnecessary restrictions is not what to be done.
